---
name: Rule proposal
about: Propose a new rule or a change to an existing rule
title: "rule: <domain> — <short title>"
labels: rule
---

**Domain / prefix:** <e.g. FRM, A11Y, NAV>

**Proposed rule (use the schema):**
- **Rule:** <testable MUST/SHOULD statement with concrete numbers>
- **Why:** <rationale grounded in a standard or human factor>
- **Platforms:** all | ios | android
- **Severity:** error | warning | suggestion
- **Check:** <validator name, or "manual">
- **Exceptions:** <if any>
- **See also:** [[RELATED-ID]]

**Source(s):** <link to the standard / research backing this>

**Can it be machine-checked?** <yes/no — if yes, sketch how a validator would detect it>
